channel.title: Artificial-Intelligence on Lightly Caffeinated
channel.description: Recent content in Artificial-Intelligence on Lightly Caffeinated

item.title: Base language models will always hallucinate
item.description: Base LLMs will always hallucinate # A paper came out a few months ago, Why Language Models Hallucinate by the OpenAI group1 where they proved for base language models (LMs that haven’t gone through post-training2), hallucinations are inevitable.

item.title: AI, research, computer science pt. 1
item.description: Abstract # As some may know, I completed an undergraduate degree in computer science, primarily focusing on AI and reinforcement learning.
